requirement_topic.en: EMC, Low-Voltage Safety, and Residual-Current Protection
requirement_topic.zh: EMC、电气安全与剩余电流保护
requirement_topic.zht: EMC、低電壓安全與剩餘電流保護

summary.en: Iceland-ready EV chargers must support CE-aligned electrical safety and EMC obligations for in-scope equipment. IEC 61851-1 is a core EVSE safety reference, and EMC coverage should be mapped to applicable EMC routes including installation assumptions such as earthing, RCD design, overcurrent protection, and DC leakage response.
summary.zh: 投放冰岛的充电桩应满足适用范围内的 CE 对齐电气安全与 EMC 义务。IEC 61851-1 是 EVSE 安全核心参考，EMC 覆盖需映射到适用的 EMC 路线，并结合接地、RCD 设计、过流保护和直流泄漏响应等安装假设。
summary.zht: 投放冰島的充電樁應滿足適用範圍內的 CE 對齊電氣安全與 EMC 義務。IEC 61851-1 是 EVSE 安全核心參考，EMC 覆蓋需映射到適用的 EMC 路線，並結合接地、RCD 設計、過流保護及直流洩漏回應等安裝假設。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-21-2 for off-board conductive charging EMC

summary.en: China files may include GB/T 18487.1 and GB/T 18487.2 safety and EMC reports, which can support technical review. They are not a direct substitute for Iceland CE-aligned market placement and site-level protection assumptions.
summary.zh: 中国文件可能包含 GB/T 18487.1 和 GB/T 18487.2 的安全与 EMC 报告，可用于技术审查，但不能直接替代冰岛 CE 对齐上市条件和现场保护假设。
summary.zht: 中國檔案可能包含 GB/T 18487.1 與 GB/T 18487.2 的安全與 EMC 報告，可用于技術審查，但不能直接替代冰島 CE 對齊上市條件和現場保護假設。

gap.en: Differences often occur in site protection design: RCD type, earth architecture, leakage thresholds, upstream breaker setting, surge coordination, EMC cable routing, short-circuit rating, ambient and ingress protection, and Turkish language instructions for warnings and response actions.
gap.zh: 差异通常在现场保护设计：RCD 型号、接地架构、漏电阈值、上游断路器设定、浪涌协调、EMC 布线、短路额定、环境与防护等级，以及冰岛语警示和应急操作说明。
gap.zht: 差異通常在現場保護設計：RCD 型號、接地架構、洩漏閾值、上游斷路器設定、浪湧協調、EMC 佈線、短路額定、環境與防護等級，以及冰島語警示與應急操作說明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in-scope CE-aligned low-voltage and EMC rules apply and where installation design requires local protection and residual-current design review
mandatory_status.cn: China safety/EMC reports are useful references but do not replace Iceland CE acceptance of site-level protection assumptions

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use China GB/T safety and EMC outputs as technical baseline only. Confirm Iceland-focused residual-current and earthing assumptions against site design and operator acceptance before commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 将中国 GB/T 安全与 EMC 结果作为技术基线使用。应在调试前根据现场设计和运营方验收确认冰岛适用的剩余电流与接地假设。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 將中國 GB/T 安全與 EMC 結果作為技術基準使用。應於調試前依據現場設計及營運方驗收確認冰島適用的剩餘電流與接地假設。
